tests.test_name: Appium - PO - single test, core output structure
tests.description: Verifies that a Product Owner uploading a single Appium test file receives documented output with at least one named test case.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system produces visible output after analyzing the uploaded file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the output are fully populated with no placeholders or nulls
At least one test case is extracted from the uploaded file

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each documented test case is identifiable by name

tests.test_name: Appium - PO - DataProvider expands one test per row
tests.description: Verifies that a Product Owner uploading a data-driven Appium test file sees each data row expanded into its own separate test case in the output.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system produces visible output after analyzing the data-driven file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the output are fully populated with no placeholders or nulls
Each data row in the DataProvider is expanded into its own test entry

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each expanded test case is identifiable by name

tests.test_name: Appium - QAM - single test, coverage matrix populated
tests.description: Verifies that a QA Manager uploading a single Appium test file receives output that includes a populated test coverage matrix alongside standard test documentation.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system produces visible output after analyzing the uploaded file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the output are fully populated with no placeholders or nulls
At least one test case is extracted from the uploaded file

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each documented test case is identifiable by name

test_coverage.verification_step: First test has a non-empty array test_coverage_matrix
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The QA Manager view includes a coverage matrix with at least one entry for the test

tests.description: Verifies that a QA Manager uploading a data-driven Appium test file sees all data rows collapsed into a single test entry whose coverage matrix reflects each data row individually.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system produces visible output after analyzing the data-driven file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the output are fully populated with no placeholders or nulls
Data rows are collapsed into a single test case rather than expanded for the QA Manager role

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The collapsed test case is identifiable by name

test_coverage.verification_step: Coverage matrix row count matches the examples
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each data row from the DataProvider is represented as its own row in the coverage matrix

test_coverage.verification_step: Coverage matrix rows use the correct schema for generic
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each coverage matrix row conforms to the expected structure for generic data-driven tests
